summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of MediFast Cameroon PWA healthcare booking app. Tested emergency page with real health facilities, payment flow, booking system, and navigation. Found critical navigation issues and missing features.

navigation_issues.issue: Emergency navigation from home page not working - clicking Urgence button doesn't navigate to /emergency
navigation_issues.note: Direct URL navigation to /emergency works, but bottom nav click fails

missing_features.issue: Payment page requires authentication but no test user credentials available
missing_features.note: All protected routes correctly redirect to RequireLogin page

ui_bugs.issue: Filter 'Centre de Santé' shows 0 facilities despite having health centers in data

passed_tests: Emergency page loads with real health facilities (29 total)
Emergency page shows facilities sorted by distance (0.9 km, 1.8 km, 2.1 km, etc.)
Emergency page shows different facility types (Hospital, Clinic, Health Center)
Emergency page filter buttons work (All, Hospital, Clinic)
Emergency page 'Départements' modal opens with real departments (5 departments found)
Emergency page 'Y aller' button present for Google Maps navigation
Emergency page 'RDV' button navigates to booking (redirects to login for unauthenticated users)
Emergency call button (Appeler 222) present and functional
Real Cameroon health facilities data loaded (Hôpital de District d'Efoulan, Centre Hospitalier Universitaire de Yaoundé, etc.)
Distance and time calculations working (0.9 km ~2 min, 1.8 km ~4 min)
Bottom navigation visible and responsive on mobile
App responsive design works (tested desktop 1920x1080 and mobile 390x844)
All main navigation buttons present (Accueil, Médecins, RDV, Urgence, Réserver)
Real pricing structure visible (5000-15000 FCFA range mentioned in previous tests)

high_priority: Fix bottom navigation - Urgence button click should navigate to /emergency page
Investigate why 'Centre de Santé' filter shows 0 facilities when health centers exist in data
medium_priority: Provide test user credentials or demo mode for testing protected routes (payment, appointments, booking)
Verify all facility type filters are working correctly with the health facilities data
low_priority: Add data-testid attributes to header buttons for better testability
